synopsis.value:
Lin Wo is trying hard to get her client the job in a investment company, she is very ambitious to the point of competing with her own boyfriend who is working in the same company and wants to land the same job for his client.

After some turbulations Lin Wo succeeds in her mission but gets misunderstood by Gao Shan, the other candidate for the job, to have sabotaged his chances and playing dirty.

Lin  Wo can‘t let herself be misunderstood and tries to prove her clean and fair work with helping Gao Shan lend another job by all means.
